creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
After the ports tree has been unfrozen, an outdated patchset has been
committed to bump the git port to 1.5.0.3, though 1.5.2 has been
released already.

Fix: The following patch bumps the port to 1.5.2. Make sure to remove
files/patch-Makefile after applying this patch; it is not needed
anymore.
